name: Citrus Herb Dressing
recipeIngredient: 3/4 medium-sized red bell pepper, cut up
1 cup loosely packed fresh basil leaves
2 teaspoons fresh thyme leaves or 1 teaspoon dried thyme
2 teaspoons fresh tarragon or 1 teaspoon dried tarragon
2 teaspoons fresh oregano or 1 teaspoon dried oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until pureed.
3. Makes approximately 1 1/2 cups (Per 2 tablespoons: 13 calories, 0 grams fat).
